x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Physical Review, Part C, Nuclear Physics, Vol.105, p.064614 (2022)

x4freetext: Spontaneous fission of 248Cm compiled separately.
14UD tandem accelerator
The 232Th target (~65 ug/cm2 areal density) was vacuum
deposited onto an Al backing of ~60 ug/cm2.
Fission fragments were detected by CUBE
spectrometer with two (DC) or three (pulsed beam
measurements) with active area up to (279 x 357 mm),
positioned 180 or 195 mm from the target.
Silicon monitor detectors located at 22.5 degree
scattering angle.
No data have been received from the author despite
several requests; the first request was sent to
D.Hinde on 12th October 2023.
VT
